command_schedule.csv.aggregate_command_units: normalized aggregate command [delta_a, delta_e, delta_r] in [-1, 1]
command_schedule.csv.packet_bytes: 15-byte Nano33 IoT transmitter packet, hex-encoded by CSV logger
command_schedule.csv.packet_sequence: monotone packet sequence shared from prelaunch neutral into active calibration
command_schedule.csv.packet_surface_units: normalized servo-signed surface command in PHYSICAL_SURFACE_ORDER after servo signs
command_schedule.csv.physical_surface_units: normalized physical surface command in PHYSICAL_SURFACE_ORDER before servo signs
command_schedule.csv.receiver_channel_units: uint16 receiver-channel command after receiver channel reorder

state_samples.csv.surface_state_source: estimated actuator state from command history and actuator model
